title: Operation Manager
description:
A Operation manager oversees daily production process and schedule, overseeing quality output and ensuring safety, cost-efficient, and timely production to meet delivery date-line.                    Products are produced on time and projects completed within the date-line. Utilizing needed manpower resources, materials, machine & method. Create a timescale for production, supervising production processes and adjusting schedules when needed. Daily update of production activities to General Manager by end of the day. (Set Up a reporting format)*                                         Operation Manager also responsible for all equipment’s maintenance progams to ensure every machine is keep in the highest stage for quality products.                                                          Product manufacturing Standardisation and applying quality-control programs, liaising with Team Leaders and problem solving.                                                                                                 *Due to Manufacturing business involves irregular hours, even during weekends or public holidays might occur to communicate. Committed to delivery datel-ine and quality is the top priority.

Roles & Responsibilities

·        Develop and manage a 4M manufacturing System in the work shop. Train staff’s to understand Deliveries, Quality, Process Flow and Product knowledge.

·        Update daily production Status thru WhatsApp before 5pm daily.

·        Develop and manage tracking systems for analyzing production rates and product quality and identifying production issues before they arise

·        Coordinate manufacturing staff to maximize efficiency, including creating the schedule, managing labor costs, giving instructions.

·        Assign IN/OUTING Deliveries.

·        Manage the inventory to ensure production always have the supply needed to complete production quotas quickly and efficiently, placing orders when necessary in advance so inventory is restocked before depletion

·        Fulfill administrative duties, completing production reports. Overtime schedule overviews that detail production rates and worker performances.

·        Schedule training programs for staff’s improvement at least once every quarterly for every production Saff.

·        Present production information to management, including solutions for potential improvement and strategies for implementing these suggestions.

·        Contribute to the hiring process, making recommendations for which candidates are the most capable. Interview Requires*

·        Ensure Safety at Work MUST be practice within factory premises and implement New Safety Rules when there’s a Near Miss or thru observation of unsafe method.

·        Ed-hoc duties related to (Manufacturing)  assign by GM or Director.

Requirements:

·       Diploma in Engineering with minimum 10 years hands-on experience in high Mix Low volume manufacturing environment.

·       Must work in Sheet Metal or Engineering Factory in MYR previously.

·       Good track record in leading a manufacturing operation. KPI indicator for individual performance will be set.

·       Ability to present summary reports. 

·       Ability to Lead a production team to meet or exceed the Key Performance Indicators (KPI’s) set by Operation Manager. Eg.- Productivity, Quality, and On-Time delivery, etc.

postedCompany.description: ALLIED MFG is a precision sheet metal fabrication serving the industries in Automation, Power & Engergy. From a small team and grows into a Mid Size SME, believeing achievement will bring success and Satisfaction in every day business. Team playing makes everyone important and better way of life.
